title: 07265_Trained_Random_Forests_Completely_Reveal_your_Dataset
positive_examples: Raises awareness against the privacy vulnerabilities of ensemble methods
Provides promising research paths to stress test privacy-preserving mechanisms
negative_examples: Models may jeopardize their training data even when accessed in a black-box manner
Trained RF can reconstruct most (if not all) of its training data, exposing personal or private information
